title: Circulating multi-omic signature of disease severity and cholangiocarcinoma in primary sclerosing cholangitis.
snippet: Primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) is a chronic cholestatic liver disease often associated with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) that can progress to cirrhosis or cholangiocarcinoma (CCA), both carrying a poor prognosis. The mechanisms driving disease progression remain poorly understood. We aimed to identify circulating multi-omic signatures linked to PS...
